page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB processor. It features 12 physical cores and 12 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz with a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or a GPU, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Benchmark results place the ecs.hfg7.3xlarge in the average performance tier across most test suites. It achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1267.0 and a multi-core score of 6488.0, alongside a PassMark CPU score of 13512.48. Memory bandwidth tests show 696.57 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 62.11 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. In database operations, the instance handles 11.15 million Redis SET operations per second and scores 4433.7 on PassMark database tests.

While the instance demonstrates average performance for standard workloads like static web serving at 9.92 GB/sec and software compilation, it exhibits limitations in larger machine learning tasks. LLM inference speeds for a small 135M model are average at 752.4 tokens/sec for prompt processing, but drop to a weak rating of 17.49 tokens/sec for a medium 7B model. This indicates a tradeoff where the server is suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, and database operations, but is less efficient for larger-scale AI inference workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.3xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance utilizing a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB processor. It is configured with 12 physical cores, 12 vCPUs running at 3.3 GHz, and 48.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. The instance features no local storage or GPU, and runs on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Performance benchmarks generally fall within the average tier, with a PassMark CPU score of 13512.48 and a Redis SET throughput of 11.15 million operations per second. However, it exhibits a performance tradeoff in AI tasks, showing weak capabilities for medium-sized LLM inference. This hardware profile is best suited for general-purpose workloads, database operations, and static web serving rather than intensive machine learning.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.3xlarge is an x86_64 server with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 48 GB RAM, and a 4 Gbps network baseline, delivering average performance for databases and general-purpose workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.3xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 48 GB RAM, optimized for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated twelve-core Intel Xeon server with balanced memory configuration, designed for general-purpose computing and standard database workloads.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB physical cores running at 3.3 GHz
48.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
Average performance in database operations and static web serving
Weak performance for medium-sized language model inference
